name: mRc
description: mRc is a security-centric blockchain initiative on the Base network, designed to provide a transparent and low-fee trading environment. The project is built on the principles of pure decentralization, with 100% of the initial liquidity permanently burned to ensure maximum investor protection. Developed as a neutral infrastructure tool rather than a personal asset, mRc aims to foster trust in DeFi through verified smart contract logic and a future-proof roadmap that includes renouncing ownership to the community.
